commands.review_summary:
The branch chunks docs `oxfmt` invocations, runs check formatting from a temp docs root with CRLF-normalized comparisons, and adds `CLAUDE.md` to markdownlint ignores.

PR surface: Other +7. Total +7 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live Windows reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection does show the remaining current-main risk: 662 tracked docs files are still passed through one formatter spawn, while the linked issue expects native PowerShell success.

target.title: fix(docs): make check:docs work in native PowerShell on Windows
target.body:
This PR ensures that \check:docs\ and doc formatting scripts work correctly when executed in native PowerShell / cmd environments on Windows.

Details:
- Add safety checks for child process \stderr\ and errors in \ ormat-docs.mjs\ to prevent crashes when spawning oxfmt.
- Normalize CRLF to LF in \ ormat-docs.mjs\ before comparing raw and formatted file contents.
- Chunk the list of documents processed by \oxfmt\ to bypass command-line length limitations.
- Ignore \**/CLAUDE.md\ in markdownlint checks.

Closes #44293
target.author: aniruddhaadak80
